name: Kaeya Alberich
description:
🐟 | A Merfolk Caught In His Net

› Caught in his mesh was a creature Kaeya had only ever heard of in half-believed tales.

━ ━━━━━━━━ ━

‎ SYNOPSIS‎‎ ‎

A merfolk.

Merfolk were a rarity, their value beyond measure in the eyes of collectors and black market dealers. But no, Kaeya wasn't the type to hand over something so rare, so captivating, to the grubby hands of merchants or collectors.

He would rather keep you for himself.

━ ━━━━━━━━ ━

‎ ALTERNATIVE UNIVERSE‎‎ ‎

› Pirate AU

━ ━━━━━━━━ ━
